quote_raw: defended by no fewer than six dragons.
quote: defended by no fewer than six dragons

quote_raw: her lord treasurer and master of coin: her longtime supporter Bartimos Celtigar.
quote: her lord treasurer and master of coin: her longtime supporter Bartimos Celtigar

quote_raw: its cruel blades drew fresh blood from her hands and arms and legs.
quote: its cruel blades drew fresh blood from her hands and arms and legs

quote_raw: The war will end when the heads of the traitors are mounted on spikes.
quote: The war will end when the heads of the traitors are mounted on spikes

quote_raw: take Caraxes to the Trident, together with the girl Nettles and Sheepstealer.
quote: take Caraxes to the Trident, together with the girl Nettles and Sheepstealer

quote_raw: Spare them, and send them to the Wall.
quote: Spare them, and send them to the Wall

quote_raw: Half the lords of Westeros will turn against us if we are so cruel.
quote: Half the lords of Westeros will turn against us if we are so cruel

quote_raw: he was unrelenting, incorruptible, and ingenious, all agreed.
quote: he was unrelenting, incorruptible, and ingenious, all agreed

quote_raw: Aegon II had seized the treasury along with the crown.
quote: Aegon II had seized the treasury along with the crown

quote_raw: beheaded by Aegon II at King's Landing when he refused to renounce the queen.
quote: beheaded by Aegon II at King's Landing when he refused to renounce the queen

quote_raw: became the mistress of whisperers in all but name.
quote: became the mistress of whisperers in all but name

quote_raw: Prince Daemon remained in her thrall.
quote: Prince Daemon remained in her thrall

quote_raw: a man appeared from the north with a staff in one hand and a small boy on his back.
quote: a man appeared from the north with a staff in one hand and a small boy on his back

quote_raw: To the end he clung to the boy he had sworn to defend.
quote: To the end he clung to the boy he had sworn to defend

quote_raw: the traveler's “son” was Maelor Targaryen, the younger son of King Aegon II.
quote: the traveler's “son” was Maelor Targaryen, the younger son of King Aegon II

quote_raw: Sly the stableboy and Willow Pound-Stone were hanged from the center span.
quote: Sly the stableboy and Willow Pound-Stone were hanged from the center span

quote_raw: a monster thirty stone in weight, simpleminded and half-mad.
quote: a monster thirty stone in weight, simpleminded and half-mad

quote_raw: closed her castle gates, turning away even anointed knights and lords.
quote: closed her castle gates, turning away even anointed knights and lords

quote_raw: along with the man who had owned the horse.
quote: along with the man who had owned the horse

quote_raw: Have mercy on my children, lord.
quote: Have mercy on my children, lord

quote_raw: he did strip her castle of its wealth and every scrap of food.
quote: he did strip her castle of its wealth and every scrap of food

quote_raw: Ser Criston Cole abandoned Harrenhal.
quote: Ser Criston Cole abandoned Harrenhal

quote_raw: with the head of Ser Criston Cole upon a spear.
quote: with the head of Ser Criston Cole upon a spear

quote_raw: I have the dragon's bastard in me.
quote: I have the dragon's bastard in me

quote: the Lionslayer who had cut down Jason Lannister

quote_raw: I'll have no songs about how brave you died, Kingmaker.
quote: I'll have no songs about how brave you died, Kingmaker
